parts.text: Help me manage or remove add-ons for my current subscription.
I want to add extra data or calling features to my plan.
I need to remove an add-on and adjust my monthly charges.
Can you help me add a messaging package to my plan?
I want to replace an old add-on with a new one on my account.
I’d like to see the options for upgrading my plan with add-ons.
Can you remove the add-on I accidentally subscribed to?
I want to check if I can add additional features to my current plan.
I need guidance to manage all my plan add-ons.
Please assist me in adding a premium add-on service.
I want to remove the international calling add-on from my plan.
How can I add a new plan add-on for my device?
I need help managing the extra packages attached to my account.
Can I remove a specific add-on from my mobile plan?
I’d like to add a data add-on to my existing plan.
I need to modify my add-on options for my account.
I want to update my plan by adding new features.
Please help me remove an add-on that I
no
longer need.
I want to check which add-ons are currently active on my account.
Can you guide me on adding extra services to my plan?
I need assistance with removing a plan add-on.
How do I manage the add-ons on my plan?
I’d like to remove an add-on from my account.
Can you help me add an additional feature to my mobile plan?
I want to add an add-on package to my current plan.
